name: claude-classroom-submit
description: Autonomous Google Classroom submission for Claude Code. Bypasses the cross-origin Drive Picker iframe by going straight to the Classroom REST API: upload a local file to Drive via rclone, find the target assignment by query, attach the Drive file, and turn in — all in a single CLI call. Pure Python stdlib (zero third-party dependencies), OAuth 2.0 Installed App flow with local-only refresh-token storage. Built for students who want to finish their homework without clicking through Google Classroom's picker UI.
